description: Style Note Tonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out! Product Details Crafted in fine fabric this trendy top from Tonga has a round neck, flutter sleeves with a sash in the middle, sequins and bead work on the front Material and Care 60% cotton and 40% silk Hand wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang or line dry Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
